description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, featuring a mix of black and white exterior walls. The house includes multiple large windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. A driveway with a parked car leads to a covered carport on one side, while the main entrance is accessible via a small set of steps at the front. The structure sits on a green lawn base, with paved walkways and a minimalistic landscaping element near the carport. The roof is flat and unadorned, emphasizing the contemporary architectural style. The overall design is clean and functional, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, black and white exterior, large asymmetrical windows, and a carport with driveway on a green lawn base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, driveway, and carport with a parked car.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the white exterior, back door, and additional windows with a small set of steps.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the carport, driveway, and a mix of window sizes along the white wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the black exterior, carport, and more windows, with the driveway extending to the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small set of steps, and minimalistic design without porch or decorative columns.
